context: Tests whether the response provides a robust WebSocket reconnection design.

checklist.name: Implements exponential backoff
checklist.description: Reconnection delays increase exponentially (e.g., 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s...) with a maximum cap

checklist.name: Adds jitter to backoff
checklist.description: Adds randomized jitter to prevent all clients reconnecting simultaneously after server restart

checklist.name: Handles missed message recovery
checklist.description: Describes a mechanism to catch up on missed data after reconnection (last-event-id, sequence numbers, timestamp-based replay, or full state sync)

checklist.name: Detects connection loss
checklist.description: Uses onclose/onerror handlers and optionally heartbeat/ping-pong to detect stale connections

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: WebSocket API usage is correct and the reconnection logic is sound
